JUNIOR DEVELOPER

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Junior web developer with 1 year of experience in frontend development using React.

TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages: JavaScript, HTML, CSS
Frontend: React, Bootstrap, jQuery
Tools: Git, VSCode

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Junior Frontend Developer - Web Studio (2023 - Present)
- Built responsive web pages using React and Bootstrap
- Fixed bugs and implemented simple features based on requirements
- Worked with design team to implement mockups

Intern Developer - Digital Agency (2022 - 2023)
- Assisted in developing React components
- Fixed CSS issues
- Helped with HTML markup

EDUCATION
Certificate in Web Development (2022)
Online Bootcamp

PROJECTS
- Personal Portfolio Website (React, CSS)
- Simple Todo App (React)

SKILLS
